title: Abu'l-Ma'ali Nasrallah
body: Nasrallah ibn Muhammad ibn Abd al-Hamid Shirazi (Persian: نصرالله بن محمد بن عبدالحمید شیرازی), better known as Abu'l-Mali Nasrallah (ابوالمالی نصرالله), was a Persian poet and statesman who served as the vizier of the Ghaznavid Sultan Khusrau Malik.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from January 2026
